chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D- 459 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For order on office objection (s) For hearing of main case 27.8.2025 None is present for the Petitioner Mr.Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Asst. A.G Sindh Mr.Dhani Bux Mari, A.P.G Sindh ********** In view of the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025 (Sindh Act No. XVII of 2025), as published in the Sindh Government Gazette dated 18th August 2025, whereby Section 35 of the Principal Act has been amended, empowering the Special Court / Competent Court (Court of District and Sessions Judge) to entertain all bail applications, the instant petition stands disposed of accordingly. The petitioner is at liberty to approach the Competent Court for seeking the appropriate relief in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
